---
title: "Home"
---

## Hi, I'm Guilber

Welcome to my corner of the web. This site collects my [lab_notes](lab_notes/index.qmd), [projects](projects.qmd), and [portfolio](portfolio.qmd) work.

- <span class="nf"></span> **[Lab Notes](lab_notes/index.qmd)** — experiments to apply what I learned in books, courses, and articles.
- <span class="nf"></span> **[Projects](projects.qmd)** — things I'm building.
- <span class="nf">󰀻</span> **[Portfolio](portfolio.qmd)** — some selected work.
- <span class="nf">󰯾</span> **[About](about.qmd)** — who I am.

## Test `ggplot2`

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
source("theme_radicle_night.R")

# This is a comment
ggplot(mpg, aes(x = displ, y = hwy, color = class)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  labs(
    title = "Engine Displacement vs Highway MPG",
    x = "Displacement (L)",
    y = "Highway MPG"
  ) +
  scale_color_radicle_night() +
  theme_radicle_night()
```
